title: The Depths of Impel Down: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: The Royal Shichibukai Marshall D. Teach

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Aka Black- Beard and His Pirates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: How do we respond to this situation!!?

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: Damn you, Magellan!!! That makesshift thing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have no idea why Blackbeard attacked.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm on my way as well.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Hold on until I make it there....!!!
